## CLA requirement

External contributions require a signed Contributor License Agreement before this PR can be
merged — see the "Before you start writing code: the CLA" section of
[`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../CONTRIBUTING.md) and the full text in [`CLA.md`](../CLA.md). If you
haven't signed yet, an automated bot will comment on this PR with instructions the first time it
runs; the required "CLA signed" status check must pass before merge.
